sync.network_offline: Network is offline. Changes are queued locally.
sync.server_unavailable: Sync server unavailable. Your work is safe and will sync when it returns.
sync.auth_expired: Session expired. Please log in to resume syncing.
sync.already_resolved: This conflict has already been resolved.

codes.NOT_AUTHENTICATED: You are not signed in. Please log in to continue.
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Some of the information entered is invalid. Please review and try again.
codes.CONFLICT_PARKED: This change conflicts with another and has been parked for review.
codes.NOT_FOUND: The requested record could not be found.
codes.NETWORK_OFFLINE: Network is offline. Your change was saved locally and will sync later.
codes.SERVER_UNAVAILABLE: The sync server is unavailable. Your work is safe and will sync when it returns.
codes.UPGRADE_REQUIRED: This app version is no longer supported. Please update to continue syncing.
codes.OFFLINE_NOT_ALLOWED: This action requires a connection to the server and cannot be done offline.
codes.DATABASE_ERROR: A local data error occurred. Please try again.
codes.CONFIGURATION_ERROR: The app is not configured correctly. Please check your settings.
codes.INTERNAL_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
